headline: lululemon athletica Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: lululemon athletica has considerably underperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts are cautious about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Globus Medical and Conagra Brands have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: GMED jumps as Globus Medical boosts EPS guidance after a Q1 earnings beat, while Conagra faces margin pressure and estimate cuts.

headline: Love Stories Unwind
summary: The average S&P 500 stock gained 35% in the year leading up to the index's most recent all-time closing high made last Thursday (5/14).
